abstract.text: A copy of this node without the leading trivia of the first token in the
node and the trailing trivia of the last token in the node.
The absolute position of the starting point of this node. If the first token
is with leading trivia, the position points to the start of the leading
trivia.
If the token has an error that’s inherent to the token itself and not its
surrounding structure, this defines the type of the error.
specifies at which offset the error occurred.

leading or trailing trivia.
